stemHtml:
Refer to figure or AMSTERDAM - Chart 11-1 from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. 
When do you start turning inbound for the final approach?

options.a: 1 minute after LCTR for category A-B, 1 minute and 15 seconds for category B-C
options.b: 2 minute after passing overhead the CH locator
options.c: 1 minute after passing overhead the CH locator
options.d: When crossing bearing 042 to VOR SPL
